category_sources: source_facts.description says network logon cracker; official GitHub README describes Hydra as a proof-of-concept tool for security researchers and consultants testing remote access risk across many protocols.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hydra; official GitHub repository is vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra and README banner names HYDRA.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains introduction, supported protocols, installation, and usage; repository includes the official hydra.1 man page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies network logon cracking; official GitHub README describes legal security testing and lists supported network protocols.
